summary: Complete testing of Enhanced Style Dropdown Pattern Fill Feature in Prayer Areas Daily Log (السجل اليومي للخرائط). Backend: 10/10 tests passed - all pattern fields (fill_type, pattern_type, pattern_fg_color, pattern_bg_color), stroke_opacity slider, and dash-dot border style work correctly. Frontend: Style panel (تنسيق الشكل) displays all features - Solid/Pattern fill toggle, 12 pattern grid, pattern color pickers, stroke opacity slider, 4 border styles including dash-dot, and live preview.

backend_api.session_has_pattern_fields: PASS - Zone has fill_type, pattern_type, pattern_fg_color, pattern_bg_color, stroke_opacity, stroke_style fields
backend_api.update_fill_type_to_pattern: PASS - Can change fill_type from solid to pattern
backend_api.update_pattern_colors: PASS - Can update pattern_fg_color and pattern_bg_color
backend_api.update_stroke_opacity: PASS - stroke_opacity slider value persists (0.5 tested)
backend_api.update_stroke_style_dash_dot: PASS - New dash-dot border style accepted
backend_api.all_12_pattern_types: PASS - All patterns accepted: diagonal-right, diagonal-left, diagonal-cross, horizontal, vertical, grid, dots-small, dots-large, dense, light-fill, medium-fill, diamonds
backend_api.all_4_stroke_styles: PASS - All border styles work: solid, dashed, dotted, dash-dot
backend_api.switch_back_to_solid: PASS - Can revert from pattern to solid fill
backend_api.combined_style_update: PASS - All style fields update in single request
backend_api.add_zone_with_pattern: PASS - New zones can be created with pattern fill

frontend_style_panel.style_dropdown_button: PASS - تنسيق (Style) button appears when zone selected in edit mode
frontend_style_panel.panel_header: PASS - 'تنسيق الشكل' header with palette icon
frontend_style_panel.fill_type_toggle: PASS - لون صلب/نقش (Solid/Pattern) toggle with green highlight
frontend_style_panel.pattern_grid: PASS - 12 patterns displayed in 6x2 grid with selectable buttons
frontend_style_panel.pattern_fg_color_picker: PASS - لون النقش (Pattern Foreground) color input
frontend_style_panel.pattern_bg_color_picker: PASS - لون الخلفية (Pattern Background) color input
frontend_style_panel.fill_opacity_slider: PASS - الشفافية (Opacity) slider for pattern fill
frontend_style_panel.stroke_opacity_slider: PASS - شفافية الحدود (Border Opacity) slider - NEW FEATURE VERIFIED
frontend_style_panel.border_style_options: PASS - 4 options: متصل (solid), مقطع (dashed), نقطي (dotted), شرطة-نقطة (dash-dot) - NEW 4th OPTION VERIFIED
frontend_style_panel.live_preview: PASS - معاينة (Preview) section shows pattern/style in real-time
frontend_style_panel.zone_renders_pattern: PASS - Zone on map displays SVG pattern fill (yellow bg with blue diagonal stripes)

critical_code_review_comments: PATTERN_TYPES constant in constants.js correctly defines 12 pattern types
ZonePatterns.jsx provides clean SVG pattern generation with getPatternContent function
MapToolbar.jsx Style dropdown conditionally renders only when zone is selected
Fill type toggle properly switches between solid color picker and pattern grid
Stroke opacity slider correctly maps 0-100% to 0-1 float value
SessionZoneUpdate model in models.py includes all pattern fields
add_session_zone route in sessions.py accepts pattern fields for new zones
MapCanvas.jsx renders patterns using url(#zone-pattern-{id}) fill reference
seed_data_creation: Session 96146858-21ae-4dec-90b4-8813c81f8eec (Feb 18, 2026) with zone 07eb8939-3efd-4839-baf8-0541861574b7 was updated during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 tested Pattern Fill Feature in Style Dropdown. Key data-testids: style-dropdown-btn, style-panel, fill-type-toggle, fill-type-solid, fill-type-pattern, pattern-grid, pattern-opt-{type}, pattern-fg-color, pattern-bg-color, stroke-opacity-slider, stroke-style-options, stroke-style-dash-dot, style-preview. The 12 patterns: diagonal-right, diagonal-left, diagonal-cross, horizontal, vertical, grid, dots-small, dots-large, dense, light-fill, medium-fill, diamonds. All Arabic labels: التعبئة (Fill), لون صلب (Solid), نقش (Pattern), نمط النقش (Pattern Type), لون النقش (FG Color), لون الخلفية (BG Color), الحدود (Border), شفافية الحدود (Border Opacity), نوع الحدود (Border Style), معاينة (Preview). Backend accepts PUT /api/admin/map-sessions/{id}/zones/{zone_id} with pattern fields.
